title: Include Time/Hour column in Calendar
excerpt: In the view of calendar - include the time/hour column for the time of day. Also include start and end time if there are more than one time/hour column.

posts.author: Soroh (Soroh Donn)
posts.cookedHtml: In the view of calendar - include the time/hour column for the time of day. Also include start and end time if there are more than one time/hour column.
